_comment: AbhavTech WxCC SLM — corpus manifest. Single source of truth for what goes where.
_usage: Consumed by download_corpus.py. Edit this, not the script.

folders.01_webex_calling: Webex Calling architecture, PSTN, LGW/CCP, zones, Trusted Network Edge
folders.02_wxcc_architecture: WxCC architecture, documentation hub, guide indexes
folders.03_wxcc_config: Routing, agent config, desktop settings, digital channels
folders.04_wxcc_ivr_flow: Flow Designer, IVR logic, virtual agent handoff
folders.05_cisco_security: WxCC security guide, GCP security overview
folders.06_licensing: Flex plan, offer descriptions, tariff plans
folders.08_gcp_ccai_vertex_ai: CCAI Platform, Agent Assist, Vertex AI, Customer Experience Insights
folders.10_migration: UCCX / Avaya / CUCM migration guides and playbooks
folders.12_compliance: PCI DSS, HIPAA, GDPR, NIST — general compliance
folders.13_india_regulatory: DoT / OSP, India DC, India setup
folders.14_eu_regulatory: EU AI Act, DORA, GDPR transfer mechanics

tiers.1: Official vendor/regulator primary source (Cisco help/docs, Google Cloud docs, EUR-Lex)
tiers.2: Organisation-authored or third-party synthesis — rank below Tier 1 at retrieval
tiers.3: Conference deck / blog / marketing — point-in-time, use for patterns not facts

documents.title: EU AI Act — Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 key articles (3, 5, 50, 113)

documents.title: Webex Contact Center India Tariff plan
documents.note: Article n955r4q. Source for B7 India SKU rows (A-FLEX-WCC-P-C 6765.31, S-C 4341.84, AI-AGT 4081.63, C-IVR 2142.86, G-VBOT 6.12 INR MSP). Already downloaded as PDF — this is the URL of record.

documents.title: Webex Calling India tariff plan
documents.note: Article d7a6zp. Webex Calling India regulated price list. Note: no pricing change for MNC customers with India branch offices (per IN-02). Grounds B7 Calling India rows.

documents.title: Create zones / Trusted Network Edge (India)
documents.note: MERGED INTO IN-02 — the zones / Trusted Network Edge content is a SECTION of the 'Enable Webex Calling in India' article (n2h1tadb), not a separate document. Downloading it again would create duplicate chunks in Qdrant — exactly the failure the cascading-split bug caused. Content is covered by IN-02. Kept as a pointer so the workbook cross-reference (C1 pattern IN-Z, B2 zone rows) has a traceable ID.

documents.title: Apply toll bypass policy configuration on Webex Calling
documents.note: MERGED INTO IN-02 — the supplied link is an ANCHOR (#reference-template_829e...) into the same 'Enable Webex Calling in India' article (n2h1tadb). Fetching an anchor returns the whole page = duplicate chunks. Content covered by IN-02. Kept as a pointer for the C6/C7 toll-bypass cross-reference.

documents.title: Flow Designer Guide — Bridge and Blind Transfer Activities
documents.note: MERGED INTO CI-03 — 'Build and manage flows with Flow Designer' is article nhovcy4, the SAME article already registered as CI-03 (Flow Designer Guide). The Bridge/Blind Transfer + Reason Code 119 failure codes are a section within it. Kept as a pointer for the D9 tree T09 cross-reference.

documents.title: Configure Dialogflow CX Virtual Agent in Webex Contact Center
documents.note: THE Cisco-side integration doc. Grounds C9 AI patterns + B4 WxCC<->Dialogflow rows. Closes the biggest AI gap.

documents.title: Configure Virtual Agent Voice in Webex Contact Center
documents.note: VAV config — Flow Designer side. Art 50(1) disclosure lands here (caller interacts with AI).

documents.title: Webex Contact Center — AI (Developer Hub)
documents.note: Cisco's AI capability index. Cross-check against B1 AI Features rows + EU Art 5/50 screening.

documents.title: Bring Your Own Virtual Agent (BYOVA)
documents.note: BYOVA/BYOAI. India: BYOAI on Indian number flows must connect ONLY to India services (IN-01). Cross-ref A5.

documents.title: Configure CVA (Customer Virtual Assistant) with Webex Contact Center
documents.note: LEGACY confirmed 20 Jul 2026: Cisco doc 217186 dated 29 Jul 2021, Dialogflow ES CVA path — predates Conversational Agents rename and Virtual Agent V2. VERIFY flag RESOLVED. Retained in corpus for ES->CX migration scenarios only (C9 row 18); not current-config guidance.

documents.title: Webex CC Setup & Administration Guide — Routing chapter
documents.note: Primary admin reference. Entry points, queues, dial plans, skill-based routing, CDGs. URL from reference sheet (utm param stripped).

documents.title: Contact Routing — queue, skill relaxation, agent routing
documents.note: Queue Contact activity, EscalateCallDistribution, preferred/last-agent routing. NOTE: this is a PDF, not a web page — type set to pdf.

documents.title: Flow Designer Guide — nodes, activities, IVR logic
documents.note: Article nhovcy4. Every Flow Designer node/activity. ALSO CONTAINS the Bridge and Blind Transfer activities and their failure response codes (Reason Code 119 / CALLING_RESTRICTION) — so this doc grounds D9 tree T09 as well as C9/B4. Absorbs IN-07.

documents.title: Webex Contact Center Architecture (full — components, integrations, deployment, security, compliance)
documents.note: Article ID utqcm7. Covers logical architecture, functional components (interaction management, media types, routing & queueing, admin, reporting), integrations (CRM), deployment options, security protocols, compliance considerations. Page dated 16 Jul 2025 — VERIFY currency: predates India DC GA (Apr 2026), so any India content will be absent or stale. Grounds C1/C2 architecture rows and B1 component rows. | LIVE RE-FETCH 20 Jul 2026: article unchanged since 16 Jul 2025 — AWS statement and region list verified current-published. OCR snapshot superseded; move to _registry/snapshots. Staleness on India/regions stands (workbook India rows + CI-24 win).

documents.title: Data Locality in Webex Contact Center — Country of Operation to data centre mapping
documents.note: Article n0p6xa1, updated 27 May 2026. AUTHORITATIVE country->DC tables: US (+LatAm/Caribbean incl Brazil/Mexico), Canada, UK (+Gulf ex-UAE, Africa, Turkey, Pakistan, Central Asia), Germany/EU, Singapore (+UAE, HK, Taiwan, Korea, SEA), Australia/NZ, Japan, India. Tenant DC hosts: tenant config, CDRs, call recordings, reporting, digital channels. China absent from all tables = not a Country of Operation. Grounds the full B12 Data Locality Matrix and the AWS Reconciliation change set (19 Jul 2026). Second source alongside CI-04/utqcm7 for the AWS platform resolution. Phase 7 monitored source — HIGH change rate (DC launches).

documents.title: Cisco Live 2024 — BRKCCT-2028 Webex Contact Center Routing & Flow Orchestration
documents.note: TIER 3: conference deck, point-in-time. NOTE: the reference sheet listed a docs/2023/ path for the same session code; this docs/2024/ path was supplied separately. Both may resolve — session codes recur across years. VERIFY which year the downloaded file actually is and record it in the header. Either way it PREDATES the India DC (GA Apr 2026), the Conversational Agents rename, and the CX console deprecation. Use for HLD diagrams only, never for facts.
